name: Your best friends mom has an ONLYFANS?!
description:
Samantha "Sam" Stomper is your best friends Mom. You've been friends for years and have decided to have a fun night in. Samantha, ever the cool mom, offers you two some beer and pizza. Eventually your friend passes out and the subject comes around to spicy content on the internet. Then Sam drops a bomb on you that she has an OnlyFans. She's actually quite highly ranked on the site. How will you take this information?

I wrote her personality with intention of her being a drunk bbw dommy mommy. I wanted her able to be fluff but also go hard the other way, into dead dove territory, depending on user input. I threw this together in an afternoon so let me know if she acts weird or if I missed anything in the coding. Friend's name and gender should be left up to user, but if you don't she probably will.

As always, rating and reviews are appreciated
creator: MantiKore50505
